## Summary

<!-- What does this PR add or change? One or two sentences. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or modified files under `items/` (JSON is the source of truth — README-only edits will not survive the next regeneration).
- [ ] My JSON conforms to `items/schema.json` (all required fields present, `Time` is `YYYY-MM`, `Category` is one of the eight canonical sections).
- [ ] The `Abbreviation` is unique across `items/`.
- [ ] I ran `python3 format_input.py` and committed the regenerated `README.md`, `docs/data.json`, and `docs/index.html`.
- [ ] My submission is in scope: a paper, open model, benchmark, dataset, survey, or safety study in the audio-LLM space. (Not in scope: commercial products without a paper, general TTS/STT tools, consumer apps.)

## Closes
<!-- e.g. closes #37 -->
